title: [release-1.2] bump c/storage, c/image, c/common for RHEL 8.4.0.2
body: Bumps c/common to v0.38.1, c/image to v5.12.0 and c/storage to v1.31.3.  Plus a number of other dependencies as part of the bargain.  This is aimed for RHEL 8.4.0.2 and we will need to make a skopeo v1.2.4 once merged.

comments.body: Please DO NOT MERGE without a @vrothberg head nod.  Last time I almost messed up the branch with an update similar and I want to make sure this is OK.
